title: SNX-1012-CLN2: A clinical trial to study the effect of a new drug SNX-1012 on mouth ulcers in Patients Receiving Cancer Treatment when compared to a placebo
condition: Ulcerative Oral Mucositis in Cancer patients receiving Cytotoxic Chemotherapy,
inclusion_criteria:
?	Patients with breast or lung cancer who will get these regimens of CT:
?	doxorubicin, cyclophosphamide, plus or minus taxane (for breast cancer), 
?	Epirubicin, cyclophosphamide, plus or minus taxane (for breast cancer), 
?	Platinum or anthracyclines for lung cancer
?	Naive to focal radiation therapy to head for cancer prior to CT Cycle 1 ? OR - prior stomatotoxic response to chemotherapy
?	Histological /FNAC confirmed diagnosis of lung or breast carcinoma
?	Bronchoalveolar cell carcinoma is not allowed
?	Subjects will receive the same dose of CT in Cycle 1 and Cycle 2
?	Karnofsky performance score ³ 60
?	Screening laboratory assessments:
?	Hemoglobin (Hgb) level ³ 9 g/dL
?	Absolute neutrophil count (ANC) ³ 1.5 x 109/L
?	Platelet count ³ 100 x 109/L 
?	Serum bilirubin level £ 1.5 times institutional upper limit of normal (ULN)
?	Serum aspartate aminotransferase (AST) and/or alanine aminotransferase (ALT) level £ 2 times above ULN
exclusion_criteria:
?	Presence of active or history of chronic oral mucosal disease
?	Diagnosis of bronchoalveolar cell carcinoma
?	Currently receiving an investigational agent, planning to receive an investigational agent during the study period, or received an investigational agent within 30 days of the first dose of SNX-1012
?	Unwilling/unable to receive periodic oral assessments by a study evaluator or unable to complete the daily self-reported outcome questionnaire
?	Unable to receive Cycle 2/3 chemotherapy at the same dosage as Cycle 1/2 chemotherapy
?	 Prior history of oral mucositis with previous
	chemotherapy treatment
?	 Previous treatment with an anthracycline
	agent (other than low-dose neoadjuvant
	therapy)
?	Prior or planned focal radiation therapy in the
	head or neck regions for the treatment of cancer
	(prior radiation to areas other than the head
	and neck is permitted)
locations: Bhagwan Mahavir Cancer Hospital and Research Centre
